meta.title: Creative web design and development studio
meta.desc: heeeyooo studio is a creative studio crafting bold branding, design, and web experiences that make brands shine.

home.heroSecTitle: We create modern websites, landing pages, and online stores that work fast, look great, and grow your business.
home.featuredWorkDesc: Explore our featured projects to see how we’ve helped businesses improve their online presence, boost engagement, and achieve their goals through innovative digital solutions. Some projects were built for clients, others for ourselves

services.title: Our Services
services.desc: As a full-service web design and development studio, we build high-converting digital experiences from concept to launch. We seamlessly combine strategic UX/UI design, custom web development, and proactive post-launch maintenance to scale your business online.

uiUxDesign.title: UX/UI Design
uiUxDesign.desc: Looking for a custom website design that looks stunning and drives measurable business growth? Our professional UX/UI design services blend creative branding with high-converting user experiences. We specialize in custom responsive web design, mobile-first layouts, high-performance landing pages, and intuitive e-commerce interfaces designed to turn casual visitors into loyal customers.

webDevelopment.title: Web Development
webDevelopment.desc: Need a secure website or a scalable web application that works flawlessly? Our expert web development services deliver clean code and custom solutions tailored to your business goals. We specialize in front-end and back-end development, robust e-commerce platforms, full-stack custom web applications, and seamless API integrations to ensure your digital product is fast, reliable, and secure.

websiteRedesign.title: Website Redesign & Modernization
websiteRedesign.desc: Is an outdated, slow, or frustrating website costing you leads? Our website redesign services transform your legacy site into a modern, high-performing digital asset. We overhaul your visual identity, improve navigation, fix technical debt, and realign your digital presence with your current brand identity and business objectives.

aiIntegration.title: AI Integration & Automation
aiIntegration.desc: Ready to supercharge your business efficiency with artificial intelligence? We design and deploy custom AI solutions and automated workflows that save time and reduce overhead. From training custom AI chatbots for 24/7 customer support to integrating smart automation tools (like Make and Zapier) and LLM APIs into your existing web apps, we build systems that work for you around the clock.

seo.title: SEO (Search Engine Optimization)
seo.desc: Want your website to rank on the first page of Google and attract high-intent organic traffic? Our data-driven SEO services optimize your entire digital presence. We specialize in technical SEO, keyword research, on-page content optimization, link building, and local SEO to maximize your visibility and boost conversions.

websiteOptimization.title: Website Speed & Performance Optimization
websiteOptimization.desc: A slow website destroys conversions and tanks your Google rankings. We specialize in advanced speed optimization, maximizing your Core Web Vitals, and ensuring lightning-fast page loads across all mobile and desktop devices for a flawless user experience.

websiteMaintenance.title: Website Maintenance & Support
websiteMaintenance.desc: Protect your digital investment with proactive website maintenance services. We manage real-time security monitoring, automated backups, plugin and core software updates, bug fixes, and continuous performance tuning so your site stays fast, safe, and fully functional while you focus on running your business.
websiteMaintenance.bonusDesc: Our services include 3 months of free support and maintenance after the website launch.

hosting.title: Hosting & Infrastructure
hosting.desc: Keep your website fast, safe, and accessible 24/7 with our premium managed web hosting services. We provide high-performance cloud hosting, secure server environments, SSL certificates, and a 99.9% uptime guarantee, giving your business the stable foundation it needs to scale seamlessly online.

meta.title: Portfolio | heeeyooo studio – Web Design, Branding & Digital Projects
meta.desc: Browse our portfolio of web design, branding, and digital experiences. See how heeeyooo studio delivers creative solutions that elevate brands and drive results.

meta.title: About heeeyooo studio | Creative Web Design & Branding Agency
meta.desc: heeeyooo studio is a creative web agency specializing in bold design, branding, and high-performing websites that help businesses connect, grow, and stand out online.

aboutUs.title: We create custom websites that feel truly different.
aboutUs.desc1: We design and develop fast, responsive, and user-friendly digital experiences using a minimal and modern approach — focusing on what truly matters while eliminating the unnecessary.
aboutUs.desc2: Our work is crafted for startups, small businesses, and individuals seeking a distinctive digital presence, not just another template.
aboutUs.desc3: Based in this world, we collaborate with clients globally — transforming ideas into clean, functional, and refined websites.

meta.title: Contact heeeyooo studio | Web Design & Branding Agency
meta.desc: Contact heeeyooo studio for web design, branding, and digital solutions. Let’s discuss your project and create a website that drives results.

contact.formTitle: Tell us about you and your project.
contact.message: Tell us a little about the project...
